description: Style NoteThese flip flops from gliders reference classic styling on their footbed for colour pop appeal. The removable footbed adds an interesting dimension to the classic flip-flop without going over the top. Comes with a spare footbed in a different colour (for maximum durability)Product DetailsBlunt toed flip flop in blue and black with rubber thong style straps Air cushion system on the perforated footbed (spare footbed in orange)Soft rubber footbedSingle piece rubber outsole that has patterned nubs (herringbone grooves on parts of the footbed that form the outsole)Material and CareSynthetic, rubberDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlightRemove dust with a dry clean cloth
